homepage.tagline.message: Open-Source Research Community · Born from Go

homepage.hero.stats.message: 11 Founding Members · 40 Public-Interest Projects · Fully Open-Source · Updated Daily

homepage.origin.lead.message: Go was the first field swept by the AI wave.

homepage.origin.body.message: When AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol in 2016, Go players were among the earliest to be transformed by — and to embrace — artificial intelligence. Today, we carry that experience into health, industry, education, and public policy, helping more people benefit from this technological tide.

homepage.members.desc.message: Eleven professionals from Go, healthcare, law, marketing, and education co-founded the Taiwan Good Go Baby Association.

homepage.members.disclosure.message: All current research and tool projects are led by Chairman CΛ / Lightman, with founding members providing cross-domain consultation and review. We warmly invite more members and external collaborators to join the next phase.

homepage.feature.multilingual.desc.message: The world's only Go learning platform supporting 11 languages, including Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Cantonese, English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, Portuguese, Hindi, Indonesian, and Arabic.

homepage.feature.katago.desc.message: Comprehensive KataGo technical documentation in English, providing engineers with complete Go AI development resources.

homepage.feature.free.desc.message: All content is free and open. No registration required. We believe knowledge should be shared without barriers, so everyone can enjoy the wisdom and joy of Go.

homepage.meta.description.message: Taiwan Good Go Baby Association - Providing Go education and AI research resources, promoting Go culture development

homepage.links.official.section.desc.message: Official platforms of Good Go Baby Association, providing service status monitoring, community interaction, and video content.

homepage.links.ai.section.desc.message: Leveraging AI technology for in-depth analysis across various fields, providing real-time insights and decision support.

homepage.links.appi.section.desc.message: Professional media partner in the Asia-Pacific healthcare sector.

homepage.links.tlsr.section.desc.message: Collaborative media focused on healthcare information.

homepage.links.official.status.desc.message: Real-time monitoring of all Good Go Baby services to ensure quality and stability.

homepage.links.official.social.desc.message: Join the Good Go Baby Mastodon community to interact with Go enthusiasts.

homepage.links.official.video.desc.message: Watch Good Go Baby PeerTube channel to learn Go knowledge and techniques.

homepage.links.ai.ecommerce.desc.message: Must-read before buying! AI-powered in-depth e-commerce product research and analysis.

homepage.links.ai.security.desc.message: Stay updated on global cybersecurity threats to protect your digital assets.

homepage.links.ai.health.desc.message: Global epidemic real-time monitoring and early warning for public health safety.

homepage.links.ai.supplement.desc.message: In-depth analysis of health supplements with scientific product evaluations.

homepage.links.ai.law.desc.message: Track the latest changes in global frameworks, regulations, and industry rules.

homepage.links.ai.trade.desc.message: In-depth analysis of global trade dynamics to understand international market trends.

homepage.links.ai.job.desc.message: Monitor job market skill demand changes to plan your career development.

homepage.links.ai.education.desc.message: Plan the most suitable learning path for students to improve learning efficiency.

homepage.links.ai.policy.desc.message: Track government and politicians' policy promises to promote political transparency and accountability.

homepage.links.appi.news.desc.message: Professional media platform for healthcare news in the Asia-Pacific region.

homepage.links.appi.social.desc.message: Join Asia Pacific Pharma Insight Mastodon community to discuss healthcare topics.

homepage.links.appi.video.desc.message: Watch Asia Pacific Pharma Insight video content for healthcare information.

homepage.links.tlsr.news.desc.message: Official website of The Lancet Snake Report, providing professional medical information and reports.

homepage.links.tlsr.social.desc.message: Join The Lancet Snake Report Mastodon community to exchange medical insights.

homepage.links.tlsr.video.desc.message: Watch The Lancet Snake Report video channel to learn healthcare knowledge.

apps.meta.description.message: 好棋寶寶協會的 10 個 AI 應用工具：消費購物、健康教育、資安疫情、貿易聲量、政策追蹤。免費公開供大眾使用。

apps.meta.title.message: AI 應用工具 — 好棋寶寶協會

apps.hero.desc.message: 運用人工智慧技術，深入分析各領域情報，提供即時洞察與決策支援。所有工具免費公開。

intel.meta.title.message: 產業供應鏈情報 — 好棋寶寶協會

intel.hero.desc.message: {sites} 條供應鏈，{companies}+ 家公司，每日自動抓取新聞、財報、產業數據。每條鏈都對標代表性 ETF 作為市場基線。

research.meta.description.message: 好棋寶寶協會發表的學術論文：圍棋理論、機器學習理論、數學研究。每篇皆含互動視覺化網頁與完整數學證明。

research.meta.title.message: 學術研究 — 好棋寶寶協會

research.hero.desc.message: 我們發表的論文，每篇都是完整數學證明 + 互動視覺化網頁 + GitHub 開源。涵蓋圍棋理論、機器學習，以及經典數學問題。

homepage.pillars.desc.message: 學術論文、產業情報、AI 工具，三條主軸並行推動圍棋文化與資訊公益。

homepage.friends.desc.message: 合作夥伴媒體，提供醫療健康領域的專業內容。

homepage.intel.all.message: 查看全部 23 條供應鏈
